content:
2. Introduction
Victory Goldfields Pty Ltd (“Fairbairn” or “the Company”) is an Australian private exploration company based in Perth, Western Australia.
Victory has systematically amalgamated 37 tenements and a further 12 tenement applications into a contigous tenement package, west of
Cue in the Murchison district of WA. The package includes existing JORC (2004) Resources and a processing plant on care and maintenance.
 
The tenements have not been exposed to modern day exploration techniques and are surrounded by some of Western Australia’s most
important long-life gold mines. Over 60 gold and copper mineral occurrences have been recorded within the Coe district and within Fairbairn
Goldfield’s tenure, illustrated in Figure 1. A significant number of these are located on or close to north to north easterly trending structures.
With significant structures striking through Fairbairn Goldfield’s tenements their prospectivity must be considered very high.
